Home›Services›Threat Intelligence› APT Assessment
Threat Intelligence

APT Threat
Assessment

Advanced Persistent Threat groups — state-sponsored and organized criminal — operate with specific targeting criteria, toolsets, and objectives. Our practice identifies which threat groups are relevant to your organization and evaluates your defenses against their documented techniques.

Know Your Adversary

Not all threat actors are created equal. An APT assessment identifies the specific adversary groups most likely to target your organization based on industry, geography, data assets, and strategic value — then evaluates your security controls against their documented tactics, techniques, and procedures.

This intelligence-driven approach to security assessment provides a fundamentally different perspective than generic vulnerability scanning or compliance auditing. Instead of asking "are we compliant?" it asks "can we defend against the adversaries who are actually targeting us?"

Capabilities

  • Adversary profiling based on industry and organizational targeting criteria
  • MITRE ATT&CK-mapped evaluation of defensive controls against specific APT TTPs
  • Nation-state threat group identification and capability assessment
  • Criminal threat group analysis relevant to your industry vertical
  • Red team exercise design informed by real adversary tradecraft
  • Detection gap identification for specific adversary techniques
  • Intelligence-driven security architecture recommendations
  • Executive threat briefing with adversary dossiers
  • Annual threat landscape reassessment and update

Who We Serve

Organizations in defense, government, financial services, healthcare, and critical infrastructure. Companies that handle high-value intellectual property or state-related data. Security leaders seeking to prioritize defensive investments based on actual threat landscape. Board members requesting quantified threat assessments.

Assessment Focus

  • Nation-State Groups
  • Criminal Organizations
  • Industry-Specific Threats
  • TTP Analysis
  • Detection Gap Analysis
  • Architecture Review

Threat Assessment
